Project.NAME: grok-critic-mcp
Project.keywords: MCP, grok, multi-agent, critic, xAI, Polza.AI, code review, Responses API
Project.annotation: MCP сервер-обёртка для grok-4.20-multi-agent через Polza.AI. Tool critic_review для критического ревью кода.

M-CONFIG.NAME: Config
M-CONFIG.purpose: Загрузка и валидация конфигурации: API ключ, base URL, timeout, default agent_count

fn-load_config.PURPOSE: Load config from env vars and .env file

type-AppConfig.PURPOSE: Pydantic model for configuration with validation

M-API.NAME: APIClient
M-API.purpose: HTTP клиент для Polza.AI Responses API. Формирует и отправляет запросы к grok-4.20-multi-agent.

fn-call_responses_api.PURPOSE: Send request to /v1/responses endpoint with proper format

fn-parse_response.PURPOSE: Extract text output from Responses API response

fn-handle_api_error.PURPOSE: Map API errors to user-friendly messages

M-CRITIC.NAME: CriticLogic
M-CRITIC.purpose: Промпт-инжиниринг и логика критического ревью. Формирует system prompt и структурирует ответ.

fn-build_critique_prompt.PURPOSE: Build structured prompt for code/architecture review

fn-structured_review.PURPOSE: Run full review pipeline: prompt → API → parse → return

M-SERVER.NAME: MCPServer
M-SERVER.purpose: MCP сервер на FastMCP. Регистрирует tools и запускает stdio transport.

tool-critic_review.PURPOSE: MCP tool for critical code/architecture review

fn-main.PURPOSE: Entry point: create server and run stdio
